description: Security audit profile — Ghidra for binary analysis and Snyk for vulnerability scanning

snyk.description: Scan dependencies and code for vulnerabilities — CVE matching, license compliance, remediation advice

ghidra.description: Binary analysis and reverse engineering — decompile binaries, analyze security properties

filesystem.description: Read source files for security review — scan for hardcoded secrets, insecure patterns

fetch.description: Fetch CVE databases, OWASP references, and security advisories

brave-search.description: Search for security advisories, CVEs, and known exploits for packages in use
